channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says vandals damaged D.C. Reflecting Pool, plans to drain it again
item.description: The president claimed on Truth Social that vandals slashed the pool's lining and added chemicals, and that arrests have been made.

item.title: Trump threatens more strikes on Iran as Vance attends talks in Switzerland
item.description: President Trump warned of further attacks on Iran while Vice President Vance participated in talks with Iranian officials in Switzerland.

item.title: Survey finds 9 in 10 fathers had an unexpected emotional response to parenthood
item.description: A new report based on interviews with thousands of fathers reveals many are embracing a role beyond that of provider.

item.title: Ukrainian strikes lead Russian-held Crimea to halt civilian fuel sales
item.description: Authorities in occupied Crimea suspended gasoline sales to civilians on Sunday as Ukraine intensified attacks on fuel infrastructure.
